subcodes.first_line: O Mother of 'Alí! Upon thee be My glory and loving-kindness. Ponder thou upon the grace and loving-kindness of God. The supreme blessing hath been bestowed upon thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ام علی علیک بهائی و عنایتی در فضل و عنایت حق تفکر نما نعمت عظمی بتو عطا
subcodes.subjects: @thankfulness; gratitude, @consolation and comfort, @knowledge; recognition of God, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
